nasb.text: Then a champion came out from the armies of the Philistines named Goliath, from Gath, whose height was six cubits and a span.

esv.text: And there came out from the camp of the Philistines a champion named Goliath of Gath, whose height was six cubits and a span.

cnv.text: 有一個挑戰的人從非利士人的軍營中出來，名叫歌利亞，是迦特人，身高三公尺。

ccb.text: 非利士营中有个名叫歌利亚的巨人出来讨战。他来自迦特，身高三米，
